title: REST Client HTTP Request
description: Schema for an HTTP request as authored in a .http or .rest file using the VS Code REST Client extension.

method.description: The HTTP method for the request.

url.description: The full URL for the request, may include variable placeholders like {{host}}.

headers.description: HTTP request headers as key-value pairs.

body.description: The request body, as a string, JSON object, or GraphQL query.

name.description: Optional name for the request, used as a variable in request chaining (e.g., # @name myRequest).

variables.description: File-level variables defined with @variableName = value syntax.

environment.description: The active environment profile name providing variable values.

query.description: The GraphQL query or mutation string.

variables.description: Variable values for the GraphQL query.

operationName.description: Optional operation name for multi-operation documents.
